description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring a round, slightly tapered pot with a smooth, matte finish. The pot is filled with dark, textured soil from which several green, broad-leaved stems emerge. The leaves are elongated, with a prominent central vein and a glossy surface, suggesting a healthy, well-maintained plant. The pot itself is plain and unadorned, likely made of ceramic or a similar material, and has a subtle lip at the rim. The plant appears to be a young specimen, with leaves radiating outward and upward, providing a lush, vibrant appearance. There are no visible decorative elements or plant labels attached to the pot or plant.
description: A plain, round ceramic pot filled with dark soil supports a healthy, broad-leaved green plant. The leaves are glossy and spread outward, giving the plant a lush, vibrant look.
description_view_0: This view shows the pot and plant from the front, highlighting the broad, outward-spreading leaves and the smooth, unadorned surface of the pot.
description_view_1: From this angle, the leaves appear more layered, with one leaf arching higher than the others, and the pot's rim and body are clearly visible.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the plant's stems and the way the leaves cluster together, with the pot's round shape and soil surface in clear view.
description_view_3: Here, the leaves are seen from a slightly different angle, showing their length and curvature, while the pot remains plain and smooth.
attribute_plant_species: Ficus elastica (rubber plant) or similar broad-leafed houseplant
